name: image_load_dll_vsstrace_susp_load
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\vsstrace.dll" and (not (((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\ImmersiveControlPanel\\SystemSettings.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Temp\\{*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Package Cache\\{*"))) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*")) or (?process.executable == null))) and (not (process.executable:"C:\\$WinREAgent\\Scratch\\*" or (process.executable:"*\\temp\\is-*" and process.executable:"*\\avira_system_speedup.tmp*")))
